creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 169547
Patch to the ports tree

This patch updates devel/visualparadigm to version 13.1 build 20160415.

The port runs fine with linux Oracle java version (OpenJDK is unsupported by the upstream project).

Changes from the previous version can be found here:

https://www.visual-paradigm.com/whats-new/

Attached poudriere logs for {9.3,10.2}amd64
